overview: A mobile-first carpool app for VIT students to share cab rides to Chennai Airport, Railway Station, and other destinations. Features gender-based ride filters, group chat for joined rides, profile photos, and ride withdrawal.
features: VIT student email (@vitstudent.ac.in) only signup and sign-in
Gender-based ride filters — female-only mode shows and restricts rides to female users
Profile photo upload displayed on profile page
Ride withdrawal that frees up seats and removes user from group chat
Per-ride group chat accessible only to joined members
Seat availability tracking with overbooking prevention
Mobile-first premium UI with blue and teal accents
